failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate formation or deposition in the valve
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter upstream of BPR valve
Implement temperature control with high-precision sensors

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.08799 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Conduct thermal stability test of solvent at 130°C for 2 hours
